description: Style Note Nail that corporate style with these sharp shoes from arrow with a clean silhouette and tough stitches. If you're looking for a comfy formal shoe that has the durability of everyday staples, this is the right pair. These slip-on shoes add a roguish twist to your conventional formal ensemble. Product Details Brown shoe with leather upper, overlays and reinforced overlay on the low-cut heel for support to the ankle Five hole lace-up shoe Padded tongue and inner Outsole adhered to the upper TPU outsole with branded grooves on the forefoot and a stacked heel Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
